payload.national_information: Target obtained from the National Reproductive Health Policy (NRHP) 2017 to 2021
payload.sdg_information: Goal 3 target: By 2030, end preventable deaths of newborns and children under 5 years of age, with all countries aiming to reduce neonatal mortality to at least as low as 12 per 1000 live births and under 5 mortality to as low as 25 per 1000 live births
